LAW AND MOTION 301, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT GREG NOTO DBA PLACE PIGALLE'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. THERE IS AT LEAST A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT AS TO WHETHER THE NOTICE WAS PROPERLY SERVED AND WHETHER THE AMOUNT DEMANDED MADE THE NOTICE DEFECTIVE. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL A. KAREN CSR# 8189 301/PJB
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
